offer: For medical clinics processing 50–100 invoices/month, inefficient matching causes cash flow gaps. We automate the reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of patient records and insurance payments.
problem: Inefficient matching of patient records with insurance payments
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical clinics
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to medical clinics with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among clinics
try_it: Let users try manual entry of patient records and basic reporting
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
